title: Stand Aside
caption: Rosie had a magnifying glass. Chloe had a notebook. They were, they agreed, extremely well-equipped. Then Detective Park arrived uninvited, strode in with great authority, and announced he would be taking it from here. Rosie was outraged. Chloe was diplomatic. Detective Park had many theories. None of them were correct. This did not slow him down.
story_notes: The investigation begins. Rosie has a magnifying glass, Chloe has a notebook. Detective Park arrives uninvited and takes charge with great authority and very little useful effect.
